pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py VLM prompt check.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic, randomly generated dataset of 500 MLB players created during setup. The user is instructed to calculate advanced baseball statistics and add exactly six columns: '1B', 'TB', 'PA', 'OBP', 'SLG', and 'OPS'. The user must filter players with Plate Appearances (PA) of at least 300 to a 'Qualified_Hitters' sheet (which correctly results in 288 qualified players out of 500). Finally, the user must apply conditional formatting to highlight On-Base Plus Slugging (OPS) values greater than 0.800 (which applies to exactly 115 players). All metadata claims accurately reflect the task instructions and evaluation criteria.
